Judge Pro Tem David Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant appears in Pro Per; Respondent appears in Pro Per. No witnesses were present for either side. Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.
